news.headline: NTPC eyes low-load thermal units
news.summary: This move aims to enhance grid flexibility and support the integration of a growing share of variable renewable energy sources like solar and wind power.

news.headline: Fidra Energy Acquires 1 GW Battery Storage Project in the UK
news.summary: Listen to this article Fidra Energy, a battery storage project developer backed by EIG and the National Wealth Fund, has acquired the 1,025 MW Enderby

news.headline: Engineering Projects India Floats EPC Tender for 250 MW Solar Projects
news.summary: Engineering Projects India (EPI) has invited bids for an engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) package to develop up to 250 MW of grid-connected solar power projects in Rajasthan.

news.headline: Inox Wind’s Q4 FY26 Revenue Slips 2.4% YoY Amid Supply Chain Disruptions
news.summary: Listen to this article Wind energy solutions provider Inox Wind (IWL) posted revenue of ₹12.44 billion (~$130.5 million) in the fourth quarter (Q4) of the

news.headline: Punjab Regulator Approves Tariff for Procurement of 4 MW Solar Power
news.summary: The Punjab State Electricity Regulatory Commission (PSERC) has approved Punjab State Power Corporation’s (PSPCL) power purchase agreement (PPA) to procure 4 MW of intra-state solar power from the Water Resources Department.

news.headline: Uttarakhand Retains Generic Tariff for Solar Projects for FY 2027
news.summary: The Uttarakhand Electricity Regulatory Commission (UERC) has retained the generic tariff for solar projects for projects commissioned during the financial year 2026-27.

news.headline: Uttarakhand Proposes Ancillary Services Framework to Strengthen Grid
news.summary: The Uttarakhand Electricity Regulatory Commission (UERC) has issued the Draft Uttarakhand Electricity Regulatory Commission (Ancillary Services) Regulations, 2026, which proposes a framework for procurement deployment, and paying for ancillary services at the state level.

news.headline: Karnataka Proposes New Regulations for Distributed Solar Projects
news.summary: The Karnataka Electricity Regulatory Commission (KERC) has issued draft regulations proposing capacity limits, technical specifications, and a broader framework for grid-interactive distributed solar photovoltaic (DSPV) projects in the state.

news.headline: Andhra Pradesh Clarifies Net Metering Rules for Older Rooftop Solar Projects
news.summary: The Andhra Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission (APERC) has clarified that rooftop solar projects with installed capacities between 500 kW and 1,000 kW can continue to be billed under net/gross metering arrangements.Such projects must have been commissioned before the commencement of the APE

news.headline: APTEL Sets Aside MERC Tariff Approval for 4 GWh Battery Storage Tender
news.summary: The Appellate Tribunal for Electricity (APTEL) has set aside the Maharashtra Electricity Regulatory Commission’s (MERC) order approving Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company’s (MSEDCL) proposal to procure 2,000 MW/4,000 MWh battery storage capacity through competitive bid

news.headline: Bengaluru Apartment Cuts Power Bills by 80% With 150 kW Rooftop Solar Project
news.summary: MJR Pearl, a residential apartment community in Whitefield, Bengaluru, has installed a 150 kW rooftop solar project to reduce electricity costs and support its common-area power requirements.

news.headline: Beyond capacity: Building the systems that will power India’s clean energy future
news.summary: The future will not be defined by standalone solar parks or isolated wind farms. It will be defined by integrated energy platforms where generation, storage, digital technologies, forecasting tools, and grid infrastructure operate as a coordinated ecosystem.

news.headline: Inox Clean Energy to acquire Vena Energy India’s 5.4 GW renewable energy and 2.5 GWh BESS platform
news.summary: The platform comprises around 1 GW of operational solar and wind capacity, 1.7 GW of advanced-stage solar and wind projects and 1.2 GWh of BESS assets, a further 2.7 GW of solar and wind projects and 1.3 GWh of BESS capacity in the development pipeline, and a team of around 80 employees.

news.headline: NTPC floats EPC tenders for 790 MW solar PV projects in Rajasthan
news.summary: NTPC Renewable Energy Limited (NREL), a wholly owned subsidiary of NTPC Limited, has floated two engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) tenders for the development of 790 MW of grid-connected solar photovoltaic (PV) projects in Rajasthan.

news.headline: Ganesh Green Bharat secures 1 GWh BESS order from NTPC
news.summary: Ganesh Green Bharat Limited (GGBL) has secured an engineering, procurement, and construction order for a 1,000 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) from NTPC Renewable Energy Limited (NREL). According to the specifications of the order,

news.headline: Cabinet approves trucks and buses replacement scheme to accelerate clean mobility in Delhi-NCR
news.summary: The Union Cabinet has approved a two-year scheme to support the replacement of old trucks and buses in the Delhi-NCR region. The scheme aims to curb air pollution in the Delhi-NCR region and promote cleaner

news.headline: Agastya Green Fuels inks 250 KTPA green methanol offtake deal with SAR Group
news.summary: Agastya Green Fuels Private Limited has executed a long-term green methanol offtake agreement with SAR Maritime Agencies. The agreement covers the supply of 250 kilo tonnes per annum (KTPA) of EU RFNBO RED III compliant

news.headline: Vesper Energy closes financing for 201 MW solar project in Texas
news.summary: Vesper Energy has closed $236 million in financing for the Nazareth Solar project. The project has an installed capacity of 201 MW and is located in Swisher County, Texas. The financing package includes a construction-to-term

news.headline: Fidra Energy acquires up to 1 GW BESS project in UK
news.summary: Fidra Energy has acquired the Enderby battery energy storage (BESS) project from Innova in Leicestershire, UK.  Once operational, the project is expected to deliver up to 1,025 MW of storage capacity. The acquisition expands Fidra

news.headline: Levanta Renewables reaches financial close for solar plus storage project in Philippines
news.summary: Levanta Renewables has achieved financial close and issued the notice to proceed for the Barotac solar and battery energy storage system (BESS) project located in the Visayas, Philippines. The project comprises a 166 MWp ground-mounted

news.headline: US adds 6.4 GW of utility-scale solar, wind, storage in Q1
news.summary: Report from the American Clean Power Association finds told clean power capacity in the U.S. hit 370 GW in Q1, enough to power 80 million homes, while the pipeline for new projects grew 6% over the previous year.

news.headline: Inox Clean Energy to acquire Vena Energy India’s 6 GW renewable portfolio
news.summary: Deal adds 1.2 GW of operational assets, 1.8 GW of near-operational projects and 3 GW development pipeline; marks company's 10th acquisition in 10 months

news.headline: Suzlon Energy Charts Expansion Beyond Wind, Targets 10 GW Annual Renewable Energy Sales by FY31 – EQ
news.summary: In Short : Suzlon Energy has outlined an ambitious growth strategy aimed at expanding beyond its traditional wind energy business and achieving 10 GW of annual renewable energy sales by FY2031. The company plans to diversify its portfolio, strengthen its presence across emerging clean energy segment

news.headline: Advait Energy Transitions inks BESPA for 300 MWh BESS project with GUVNL

news.headline: NTPC floats EPC tender for 300 MW solar PV project in Rajasthan
news.summary: NTPC Renewable Energy Limited (NREL), a wholly owned subsidiary of NTPC Limited, has floated a tender for an engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) package for the development of a 300 MW grid-connected solar photovoltaic (PV).

news.headline: Patel Infrastructure floats EPC tender for 700 MW solar project in Gujarat
